title: April 23
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}
'''April 23''' is the 113th day of the year (114th in leap years), with 252 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1930|1930]] – [[Alan Oppenheimer]] is born.
*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[David Birney]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Andrew Kreisberg]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[D.B. Weiss]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Neil Hellegers]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Jaime King]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 113|''Star Wars Weekly'' 113]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[Shadows of the Empire (soundtrack)|''Shadows of the Empire'' soundtrack]] released.
*1996 – [[Splinter of the Mind's Eye 3|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' 3]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'' novelization]] and [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (junior novelization)|junior novelization]] published.
*2002 – [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (soundtrack)|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'' soundtrack]] released.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones Incredible Cross-Sections]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode II: Attack of the Clones]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones Scrapbook]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Visual Dictionary]] ''published
*2002 – ''[[Anakin: Apprentice]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[Boba Fett: The Fight to Survive]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars: I Am a Jedi Apprentice]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[Jedi Quest: The Way of the Apprentice]]'' and [[Jedi Quest: The Trail of the Jedi|''The Trail of the Jedi'']] published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Unleashed]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[The Skywalker Family Album]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars: Underworld|''Star Wars'' live-action TV series]] announced.
*[[2008]] – [[Dark Times 10|''Dark Times'' 10]] published.
*2008 – [[Knights of the Old Republic 27|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 27]] published.
*2008 – [[Legacy (2006) 22|''Legacy'' (2006) 22]] published.
*2008 – "[[Precipice]]" published on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
*[[2010]] – "[[Death Trap]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2010 – ''[[The Old Republic, Blood of the Empire Act 1: Shades of the Sith]]'' starts publishing [http://www.swtor.com online].
*[[2013]] – ''[[Vader's Little Princess]]'' published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 3]]'' published.
*2014 – [[Legacy (2013) 14|''Legacy'' (2013) 14]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars: Force Collection]]'' discontinued.
*[[2019]] – [[David Winters]] dies.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars by Gillen & Pak Omnibus]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra Vol. 7 — Dark Droids]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi: A Visual Archive]]'' published.
<noinclude>
